OmniProcessId.Name: Licensing and Permitting Security Guard Application
Licensing and Permitting Security Guard Application

PropertySetConfig.label: TextBlock2
PropertySetConfig.text: I affirm, under the penalties of perjury, that the statements made in this application are true and correct. I further affirm that I have read and understand the provisions of Article 7A of the General Business Law and the rules and regulations promulgated thereunder. In addition, I hereby authorize the Department of State and Department of Motor Vehicles to produce an ID card bearing my DMV photo. I understand that DOS and DMV will use my DMV photo to produce all subsequent ID cards for as long as I maintain my license with the Department of State.
